'''zhakoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaleshit|whaleshit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaleshit|whaleshit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhakoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæketeth|zhæketeth]] || [[word:zhæketej|zhæketej]] || [[word:zhæketesh|zhæketesh]] || [[word:zhækete|zhækete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhakokototh|zhakokototh]] || [[word:zhakokotoj|zhakokotoj]] || [[word:zhakokotosh|zhakokotosh]] || [[word:zhakokoto|zhakokoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhakototh|zhakototh]] || [[word:zhakotoj|zhakotoj]] || [[word:zhakotosh|zhakotosh]] || [[word:zhakoto|zhakoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhakoftoth|zhakoftoth]] || [[word:zhakoftoj|zhakoftoj]] || [[word:zhakoftosh|zhakoftosh]] || [[word:zhakoftof|zhakoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhakototho|zhakototho]] || [[word:zhakotojo|zhakotojo]] || [[word:zhakotosho|zhakotosho]] || [[word:zhakotoko|zhakotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhakototh|zhakototh]] || [[word:zhakotoj|zhakotoj]] || [[word:zhakotosh|zhakotosh]] || [[word:zhakoto|zhakoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhakotothol|zhakotothol]] || [[word:zhakotojol|zhakotojol]] || [[word:zhakotoshol|zhakotoshol]] || [[word:zhakotokol|zhakotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhakotothotho|zhakotothotho]] || [[word:zhakotojojo|zhakotojojo]] || [[word:zhakotoshosho|zhakotoshosho]] || [[word:zhakotoko|zhakotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhakotothon|zhakotothon]] || [[word:zhakotojon|zhakotojon]] || [[word:zhakotoshon|zhakotoshon]] || [[word:zhakotokon|zhakotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhakotothoro|zhakotothoro]] || [[word:zhakotojoro|zhakotojoro]] || [[word:zhakotoshoro|zhakotoshoro]] || [[word:zhakotokoro|zhakotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
